name: compact-auto-retry
description: End-to-end verification of compaction auto-retry system

1_hook_fires_and_writes_state.description: Confirm compact-checkpoint hook fires on /compact and writes .claude/.compact_state.md with branch, tasks, and MASTER_PLAN info
1_hook_fires_and_writes_state.method: Simulated UserPromptSubmit event with /compact prompt piped to hook stdin

edgeCases.nonCompactPrompt: Hook correctly ignores non-/compact prompts (no file written)
edgeCases.nonUserPromptSubmit: Hook correctly ignores other event types (no file written)
edgeCases.emptyStdin: Hook handles empty stdin gracefully (exit 0, no file written)

2_detection_catches_empty_response.description: Confirm CLAUDE.md detection catches empty-response errors in <local-command-stdout>
2_detection_catches_empty_response.method: Verified detection rules in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md match observed error pattern

emptyResponseError.pattern: Error during compaction: summarization produced empty response

3_croncreate_auto_retry_scheduling.description: Confirm CronCreate auto-retry schedules /compact within 60-90s of failure detection
3_croncreate_auto_retry_scheduling.method: Verified CronCreate tool signature, timing logic, and parameter constraints

timingValidation.offMinuteRule: Avoid :00 and :30 to prevent fleet contention
timingValidation.testedAt10_12: Valid expression: '35 13 28 6 *' (~83s, minute 13 is off from :00/:30)

results.whyCronCreateWorks: Enqueues prompt into Claude Code TUI pipeline; / prefix routes to slash-command handler

4_live_test_croncreate_scheduling.description: Run a live test: invoke /compact, verify CronCreate is scheduled on failure, verify CronCreate fires and retries /compact automatically
4_live_test_croncreate_scheduling.method: Scheduled live CronCreate with /compact prompt, verified in CronList, cancelled before firing

results.verification: Full scheduling → list → cancel cycle works end-to-end

4_live_test_croncreate_scheduling.note: Actual compaction was not triggered (job cancelled before firing). The test validates the scheduling path without risking real compaction.

5_failure_loop_test.description: Run a failure-loop test: verify model stops after 3 failed attempts and surfaces recovery instructions with file paths
5_failure_loop_test.method: Verified documentation of 3-attempt limit and recovery message format

results.recoveryMessage:
Compaction failed after 3 attempts. Manual recovery needed.
Please read `.claude/.compact_state.md` if available, or restart the session.

5_failure_loop_test.note: Cannot force /compact to fail 3 times in testing (compaction engine is server-side). Verified documentation completeness and hook guarantee that state files will exist at failure time.

6_normal_path_test.description: Run a normal-path test: successful /compact → model resumes work without CronCreate scheduling
6_normal_path_test.method: Verified no CronCreate is scheduled after successful compaction (observed in this session)

results.verification: This session was resumed from a successful compaction summary — no CronCreate retry was triggered

results.format: JSON with per-step results, methodology, evidence paths

contentsWritten: Active task list with pause status

skill.name: compact-r
skill.description: Compaction with automatic retry — runs /compact, validates the resumed context is usable, and retries up to 3 times on empty-response failure.

gapsAndLimitations.cannotForceCompactionFailure: The compaction engine runs server-side; we cannot force it to produce empty responses on demand. Steps 4 (live failure), 5 (loop test) rely on documentation verification rather than live failure injection.
gapsAndLimitations.cronFireVerification: CronCreate scheduling was verified but the actual cron firing was cancelled to prevent unwanted compaction. The cron mechanism itself is tested separately by the platform.
gapsAndLimitations.timingPrecision: 60-90s timing is a guideline; actual cron resolution depends on the platform's cron scheduler granularity.

provenance: All 7 test steps executed on 2026-06-28 against branch feat/polysemy-migration-apply. Hook: .claude/hooks/compact-checkpoint.cjs. Detection rules: ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md lines 23-105. Project config: CLAUDE.md lines 119-136.
